title: CookieClickerUltimate
description: Minecraft themed idle game overlay. Build a cookie empire with iconic structures, research advanced technologies, and earn Nether Star prestige bonuses to achieve massive production rates!
body:
# Cookie Clicker Ultimate

![Cookie that can be clicked. UI WIDGET](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fd3651c769493e3383366e0e199720c923b3280.png)

Build a massive cookie empire right in your inventory. Cookie Clicker Ultimate is a stylish idle game overlay that lets you earn, research, and prestige your way to astronomical production numbers.

## Features

* **Draggable UI** – Move, resize, and minimize the overlay wherever you want
* **Persistent Progress** – Your cookies follow you across worlds and servers
* **Deep Progression** – Click upgrades, buildings, and research that fundamentally change your gameplay
* **Frenzies** – Random events that boost production 2x, 10x, 50x, or 100x
* **Prestige System** – Ascend at 1 billion cookies to earn permanent production multipliers
* **Polished Polish** – Smooth animations, satisfying sounds, and optimized performance

## Requirements

* Fabric Mod Loader
* Fabric API
